prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 full-body cinematic fashion character portrait of a futuristic female Jedi warrior standing in a pale desert under a flat gray-blue sky, viewed from a low angle so she feels tall and imposing. The character has windblown platinum blonde short messy hair, a slim athletic build, tanned skin, and her face is deliberately obscured by a square pixelated censor block matching skin tones. She wears an oversized off-white Jedi poncho/cape with sculptural folded panels and wide sleeves over a cropped white top that exposes her midriff, a brown utility belt with pouches, loose black cropped harem pants, a long tan cloth tabard hanging from the waist to the ground, ankle socks, and rugged dark boots. She holds exactly one glowing white lightsaber angled diagonally down toward the bottom-left corner, with a metallic hilt in her right hand; a second dark sci-fi handle or weapon protrudes behind her right side. Behind her head is exactly one large burnt-orange circular sun disk, centered like a halo. The background is minimal and surreal: pale sand foreground, distant low stone ruins on the right, a faint rounded rock formation far right, and exactly three small black birds scattered in the sky. Use high-fashion editorial sci-fi styling, sharp sunlight, clean composition, muted desert palette of cream, tan, black, rust orange, and gray-blue, realistic fabric folds, dramatic wind movement, no text, no watermark.
